lines.text: Big thanks to everyone for jumping in to help! Let's see... I think we should first recap what my "other self" has been doing so far...
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Getting into clients' faces, quitting his job, motorbike racing... They all seem pretty random.
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: None on the surface… But results-wise, my "other self" is not doing those for personal gain...
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: And it feels like... these are all things "I've always wanted to do but didn't have the guts to try"...
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Something you've always wanted to do but are scared to start? So you're trying to predict where he might appear next... But wait, aren't we just operating on a "hunch" here?
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Okay, I get it... Well, f-follow me, everyone.
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: It's... a girl I like... right, asking that girl out to dinner... something like that... p-please, just don't dig deeper on this topic! Anyway! To the cafeteria...
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Miss Nanami, I wasn't… I didn't... it was "the other me"... Please don't believe...
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: I-I... Never mind! Ugh, considering all the things "I" have done... Here goes nothing!
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Miss Nanami! I've had a crush on you for a very long time! Will you be my girlfriend?
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: I knew it... It's a no...
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self
Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: So... my "other self" actually helped me fulfill my wishes...?
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: You're right... And thank you for the help, {PlayerName}! As part of our deal, I'll cover your meals for this whole semester! Here's my meal card, take it!
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: Oh, thank you! If you need anything in the future, be it meals or schoolwork, come find me anytime!
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self
